[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image is a simple illustrated cartoon-style head-and-shoulders graphic with labeled callouts pointing to parts of the character’s head and brain.

The main subject is an anime-like illustrated character with light blonde hair, pale skin, and green eyes, shown from the shoulders up against a plain light background. The character’s head is outlined with a cutaway/overlay effect on the top, revealing a pink brain illustration. Two label callouts point to the brain area: one label near the brain reads “neuron activation,” and another label points to the internal area, though the exact text of the smaller label is unclear.

The setting appears to be a clean, flat, diagram-like background with no visible real-world environment. The drawing style is simple and diagrammatic, with thin black lines for callouts and minimal shading.

The character has straight, medium-length blonde hair framing the face. The visible clothing is a light-colored shirt with a dark collar and dark trim around the neckline. The overall lighting is flat and even, consistent with a graphic illustration rather than a photograph. The camera perspective is front-facing and centered, with the character’s head occupying most of the image.

Visible Text:
neuron activation
A smaller label is present but is unclear and cannot be reliably read.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a cartoon character with a brain cutaway illustration and labels pointing to parts of the head. It is presented like a simple diagram on a plain background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
